original_image_tags: The document is a dark, likely photocopied or microfilmed page. The text is white or light gray on a black background. The page has two punch holes on the left margin. A large "RESTRICTED" stamp is visible at the top center and bottom right. A handwritten checkmark and the number "3" are in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: A typed document titled 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' with 'RESTRICTED' stamped at the top and bottom. It contains numbered text fields detailing an incident (Date: 8 April 1948, Location: Delaware, Ohio, etc.). No embedded photographs, sketches, diagrams, or maps are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text and stamped labels with no embedded photographs, sketches, diagrams, or maps, and both correctly identify the 'RESTRICTED' stamp at the top.
